name: Nevsun Resources Ltd.
description: Nevsun Resources Ltd. was a Canadian diversified mid-tier mining company focused on the exploration and development of base metal assets. The company was primarily known for its 60% ownership of the high-grade Bisha copper-zinc mine in Eritrea and its ownership of the Timok copper-gold project in Serbia. Nevsun operated as a publicly traded entity until it was acquired by the Zijin Mining Group Company Limited on December 29, 2018, effectively ending its status as an independent mining corporation.
